returnTag.comment: the least common multiple of the absolute value of two numbers.
returnTag.condition: methodResultID == Math.abs(args[0]) > 0 ? args[1] : (args[0] == 0 || args[1] == 0) ? 0 : (Math.gcd(Math.abs(args[0]), Math.abs(args[1])) * Math.abs(args[1])).intValue()

throwsTags.comment: the invocations lcm(Integer.MIN_VALUE, n) and lcm(n, Integer.MIN_VALUE), where abs(n) is a power of 2, throw an ArithmeticException, because the result would be 2^31, which is too large for an int value.

returnTag.comment: the least common multiple of the absolute value of two numbers.
